username.title: AUX Cloud Username
username.description: Email address or phone number registered with AUX Cloud.

region.title: Region
region.description: Select the AUX Cloud region that matches your account.

temperatureUnit.title: Temperature Unit
temperatureUnit.description: Select the unit used when displaying temperatures. Values are converted automatically when talking to AUX Cloud.

temperatureStep.title: Target Temperature Step
temperatureStep.description: Choose the increment for setpoints. 0.5 replicates AC Freedom, 1 limits adjustments to whole degrees. Fahrenheit mode enforces 1°F.

featureSwitches.title: Extra Feature Switches
featureSwitches.description: Expose optional HomeKit switches for AUX features like screen display, mildew prevention, self-clean, health, eco, and sleep modes.

pollInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How frequently the plugin should request updated state from AUX Cloud (enter a value between 30 and 600 seconds).

includeDeviceIds.title: Included Device IDs
includeDeviceIds.description: Optional list of AUX endpoint IDs to expose. Leave empty to include every discovered device.

excludeDeviceIds.title: Excluded Device IDs
excludeDeviceIds.description: Optional list of AUX endpoint IDs to skip after discovery.

commandRetryCount.title: Cloud Retry Attempts
commandRetryCount.description: Number of retry attempts when cloud response is slow or unavailable. Higher values = more reliable but slower feedback. 0 means cloud-only with no retry.

commandTimeoutMs.title: Cloud Command Timeout (ms)
commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each cloud command attempt. If the cloud doesn't respond within this time, the next retry is triggered.
